whois.title: WHOIS Lookup
whois.subtitle: Query domain names, IP addresses, and autonomous system numbers.
whois.query_label: Query — domain, IP address, or ASN
whois.error_empty: Enter a domain, IP address, or ASN number.
whois.error_failed: WHOIS lookup failed — please try again.

pwa.offline_message: This page requires a network connection. Check your connection and try again.

about.who_uses_sysadmins_desc: investigate IP ownership, routing, and registrar details quickly.
about.who_uses_security_desc: gather reconnaissance data on domains and infrastructure.
about.who_uses_investors_desc: check registration and expiry dates before acquisition.
about.who_uses_developers_desc: integrate WHOIS data into scripts and applications via the REST API.
about.feature_domain_desc: Registrar, registrant, name servers, creation date, expiry, and status for any registered domain.
about.feature_ip_desc: Network block ownership, CIDR notation, RIR assignment data for IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.
about.feature_asn_desc: Autonomous system name, description, and routing policy for any AS number.
about.feature_formats_desc: JSON, XML, and plain text — all via content negotiation or a ?format= parameter.
about.feature_caching_desc: In-memory cache with per-type TTLs: 24 h for domains, 7 days for IPs and ASNs.
about.feature_ratelimit_desc: 60 requests/minute for anonymous callers; higher limits for authenticated API tokens.
about.tech_go_desc: single static binary, zero runtime dependencies, CGO disabled.
about.tech_sqlite_desc: embedded database for caching metadata and audit logs.
about.tech_scheduler_desc: GeoIP updates, token cleanup, log rotation, and backups — no external cron required.
about.tech_docker_desc: multi-arch images for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64.
about.tech_license_desc: free for any use, commercial or otherwise.

docs.meta_description_suffix: REST API documentation — endpoints, authentication, and response formats.
docs.subtitle: RESTful WHOIS API — all endpoints are free, rate-limited, and require no account.
docs.base_url_desc_prefix: All API endpoints are versioned and prefixed with
docs.auth_desc1: Most endpoints are public and require no authentication. Bulk lookups and server operations require a server token passed as a bearer header.
docs.auth_desc2_prefix: The server token is auto-generated on first run and written to
docs.auth_desc2_suffix: No user accounts or sessions are involved.
docs.formats_desc: Format is determined by the Accept header or the ?format= query parameter. JSON is the default.
docs.endpoint_healthz_desc: Health check. Returns service status, version, uptime, and feature flags. No auth required.
docs.endpoint_whois_desc: Generic WHOIS lookup — auto-detects query type (domain, IPv4, IPv6, or ASN).
docs.endpoint_domain_desc: Domain-specific WHOIS lookup. Returns registrar, registrant, name servers, dates, and status.
docs.endpoint_ip_desc: IP address WHOIS lookup. Accepts IPv4 and IPv6.
docs.endpoint_asn_desc: ASN WHOIS lookup. Use the AS prefix.
docs.endpoint_validate_desc: Validate a query without performing the lookup. Returns detected type and validity.
docs.endpoint_bulk_desc: Bulk WHOIS lookup — up to 100 queries in a single request. Requires server token.
docs.endpoint_servers_desc: List all configured WHOIS servers by TLD and IP range.
docs.endpoint_stats_desc: Service statistics — total queries, cache hit rate, uptime, and per-type breakdown.
docs.rate_limit_note: Rate-limited responses use HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.
docs.error_rate_limited_meaning: Too many requests — back off and retry.
docs.error_server_error_meaning: Internal error — WHOIS server unreachable or unexpected failure.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.point_stored_desc: Query logs, rate-limit counters, and account data needed to operate the service.
privacy.point_sold_desc: We do not sell personal data.
privacy.point_not_sold_desc: WHOIS query content and IP addresses are never sold to third parties.
privacy.point_control_desc: You can manage cookie preferences and request data export or deletion at any time.
privacy.cookies_intro: We use cookies to operate the site and, optionally, to understand usage.
privacy.cookies_analytics_none: No analytics cookies are currently in use.
privacy.data_storage_intro: Data is stored in our database and retained only as long as necessary.
privacy.data_shared_when_intro: We share data only in the following cases:
privacy.data_shared_all_cases: All cases below apply regardless of consent status.
privacy.data_shared_necessary: When necessary to provide the service (e.g., upstream WHOIS servers).
privacy.data_shared_opt_out: With analytics providers, only if you opt in.
privacy.data_shared_may_sell: We may share aggregated, non-identifying data.
privacy.data_shared_never_sell: We never sell identifiable personal data.
privacy.third_parties_intro: We use the following third-party services:
privacy.third_parties_none: No third-party services are currently in use.
privacy.third_parties_analytics_note: Analytics services are opt-in only and disabled by default.
privacy.your_rights_intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rights_access_desc: Request a copy of the data we hold about you.
privacy.rights_export_desc: Receive your data in a portable, machine-readable format.
privacy.rights_deletion_desc: Request deletion of your personal data.
privacy.rights_cookie_control_desc: Change your cookie preferences at any time.
privacy.ccpa_intro: California residents have the following additional rights:
privacy.ccpa_right_know_desc: What personal information is collected, used, and shared.
privacy.ccpa_right_opt_out_desc: Opt out of the sale or sharing of personal information.
privacy.ccpa_right_nondiscrimination_desc: We will not deny service or charge different prices for exercising your rights.
privacy.ccpa_box_heading: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
privacy.ccpa_box_desc: Use the button below to record your opt-out preference.
privacy.ccpa_opted_out_status: You have opted out of the sale or sharing of personal information.
privacy.ccpa_note: We do not sell personal data. This control is provided regardless.
privacy.contact_intro: If you have questions about this policy, please

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.disabled: The contact form is currently disabled.

contact.abuse_desc: To report abuse of this service,

help.title: Help
help.getting_started_intro: Look up any domain with a simple request:
help.feature_domain_desc: Query registration details for any domain.
help.feature_ip_desc: Query ownership details for IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.
help.feature_validate_desc: Check whether a domain is registered without a full lookup.
help.feature_owner_search_desc: Search records by owner or organization name.
help.feature_bulk_desc: Submit multiple queries in a single authenticated request.
help.feature_servers_desc: List the upstream WHOIS servers used by this service.
help.feature_stats_desc: View usage statistics for this service.
help.feature_formats_desc: Request plain text or JSON responses via the Accept header.
help.api_docs_desc: Full endpoint reference is available via Swagger and GraphQL.
help.tor_intro: This service is also available as a Tor hidden service.
help.tor_step_paste: Paste the onion address into the address bar.
help.tor_note: The onion address may change if the service is restarted.
help.faq_q_apikey: Do I need an API key?
help.faq_a_apikey: No. Read endpoints are open. A server token enables higher rate limits and bulk lookups.
help.faq_a_ratelimit: See the rate limit table in the API documentation. Limits are higher for authenticated requests.
help.faq_q_source: Where does the data come from?
help.faq_a_source: Results are fetched live from the authoritative WHOIS or RDAP server for each query.
help.faq_q_bulk: How do I run a bulk lookup?
help.faq_a_bulk: Send a POST request with a server token and a list of queries. See the bulk lookup example above.
help.faq_q_owner_search: Can I search by owner name?
help.faq_a_owner_search: Yes, use the owner search endpoint shown above.
help.trouble_a_429: You have exceeded the rate limit. Wait for the duration in the Retry-After header before retrying.
help.trouble_q_notfound: I'm getting a 404 for a valid domain
help.trouble_a_notfound: The domain may not be registered, or the registry does not expose WHOIS/RDAP data.
help.trouble_q_stale: The result looks out of date
help.trouble_a_stale: Results are fetched live on each request; try again in a few minutes if the registry is slow to respond.
help.trouble_a_bulk_auth: Bulk lookups require a valid server token in the Authorization header.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptance_suffix: you agree to these terms of service.

consent.default_message: We use cookies to operate this site and, with your consent, to understand usage.
consent.essential_desc: Required for the site to function
consent.analytics_desc: Help us understand how visitors use our site
